items.example: I'm going home. I'm absolutely exhausted.
I can't believe how enormous your kitchen is.
The weather was awful on holiday.
This food tastes wonderful. Did you cook it?
It's minus ten degrees outside. It's freezing!
Is the heating on? It's boiling in here.
The boss was furious when he heard the news.
I'd invite you round but my apartment is tiny.
I find phrasal verbs impossible to remember.
